1138                    encoded_next_true = encoded_next_true.detach()
1139            else:
1140                encoded_next_true = None
1141
1142            for step_idx in range(steps):
1143                accumulated_delta_pred = torch.zeros_like(latent_state)
1144                # Sub-stepping loop
1145                for sub_step in range(current_substeps):
1146                     delta_pred_sub = self._compute_latent_delta(latent_state)
1147                     
1148                     # Update latent state for next sub-step (or final step)
1149                     # Delta only applies to learnable portion (first 254d), sin/cos is preserved
1150                     learnable_next = latent_state[:, :, :, :-2] + delta_pred_sub[:, :, :, :-2]
1151                     sin_cos = latent_state[:, :, :, -2:]
1152                     latent_state = torch.cat([learnable_next, sin_cos], dim=-1)
1153                     
1154                     # Accumulate total delta for loss computation
1155                     accumulated_delta_pred = accumulated_delta_pred + delta_pred_sub
1156
1157                # Use accumulated delta for auxiliary loss and checks (replaces single-step delta_pred)
1158                delta_pred = accumulated_delta_pred
1159
1160                encoded_next_pred = latent_state
1161
1162                # Apply SFNO to full state (uses internal residual connection)
1163                if self.sfno is not None:
1164                    # SFNO expects (B, C, H, W), latent is (B, H, W, C)
1165                    encoded_permuted = encoded_next_pred.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)
1166                    use_block_ckpt = self.grad_ckpt_level in (1, 3)
1167                    if use_block_ckpt and self.training and encoded_permuted.requires_grad:
1168                        sfno_out = checkpoint(self.sfno, encoded_permuted, use_reentrant=False)
1169                    else:
1170                        sfno_out = self.sfno(encoded_permuted)
1171                    encoded_next_pred = sfno_out.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)
1172
1173                    # print('SFNO USED')
1174
1175                should_decode = (step_idx + 1) % decode_frequency == 0
1176                
1177                # Compute delta_true for ALL steps (latent-space loss)
1178                if (
1179                    training_mode
1180                    and delta_true_steps is not None
1181                    and encoded_next_true is not None
1182                ):
1183                    encoded_next_true_step = encoded_next_true[:, step_idx, ...].contiguous()
1184                    if not self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad:
1185                        encoded_next_true_step = encoded_next_true_step.detach()
1186
1187                    if step_idx == 0:
1188                        prev_true_latent = initial_true_latent_for_delta
1189                    else:
1190                        prev_true_latent = encoded_next_true[:, step_idx - 1, ...].contiguous()
1191                    if not self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad and prev_true_latent is not None:
1192                        prev_true_latent = prev_true_latent.detach()
1193
1194                    delta_true = encoded_next_true_step - prev_true_latent
1195                    if not self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad:
1196                        delta_true = delta_true.detach()
1197                    delta_true_steps.append(delta_true)
1198                else:
1199                    delta_true = None
1200
1201                # Always append delta_pred for latent-space loss
1202                if training_mode and delta_pred_steps is not None:
1203                    delta_pred_steps.append(delta_pred)
1204
1205                # Decode only at decode_freq intervals (or final step if needed)
1206                if should_decode or (step_idx == steps - 1 and not x_next_pred_steps):
1207                    decoded_pred = self.decoder(encoded_next_pred)
1208                    x_next_pred_steps.append(decoded_pred)
1209                    
1210                    # Only compute decoded outputs at decode steps
1211                    if training_mode:
1212                        # Predicted tendency (decoded)
1213                        pred_tend = self.tend_decoder(delta_pred)
1214                        tend_pred_steps.append(pred_tend)
1215                        
1216                        # True tendency and reconstructed_true (decoded)
1217                        if delta_true is not None and reconstructed_true_steps is not None:
1218                            if self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad:
1219                                true_tend = self.tend_decoder(delta_true)
1220                            else:
1221                                with torch.no_grad():
1222                                    true_tend = self.tend_decoder(delta_true)
1223                            tend_true_steps.append(true_tend)
1224                            
1225                            # Decode true state at this step
1226                            encoded_next_true_step = encoded_next_true[:, step_idx, ...].contiguous()
1227                            with torch.set_grad_enabled(self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad):
1228                                reconstructed_true_step = self.decoder(encoded_next_true_step)
1229                            if not self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad:
1230                                reconstructed_true_step = reconstructed_true_step.detach()
1231                            reconstructed_true_steps.append(reconstructed_true_step)
1232
1233                            if not self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad:
1234                                reconstructed_true_step = reconstructed_true_step.detach()
1235                            reconstructed_true_steps.append(reconstructed_true_step)
1236
1237                # latent_state is already updated in the sub-step loop
1238
1239            if not x_next_pred_steps:
1240                decoded_pred = self.decoder(latent_state)
1241                x_next_pred_steps.append(decoded_pred)
1242
1243            x_next_pred_rollout = torch.stack(x_next_pred_steps, dim=1)
1244
1245            if training_mode:
1246                delta_pred_rollout = torch.stack(delta_pred_steps, dim=1) if delta_pred_steps else None
1247                if delta_true_steps:
1248                    delta_true_rollout = torch.stack(delta_true_steps, dim=1)
1249                else:
1250                    delta_true_rollout = None
1251
1252                if reconstructed_true_steps:
1253                    reconstructed_true_rollout = torch.stack(reconstructed_true_steps, dim=1)
1254                else:
1255                    reconstructed_true_rollout = None
1256                if tend_pred_steps:
1257                    tend_pred_rollout = torch.stack(tend_pred_steps, dim=1)
1258                    tend_true_rollout = torch.stack(tend_true_steps, dim=1)
1259                else:
1260                    tend_pred_rollout = None
1261                    tend_true_rollout = None
1262
1263                # Get final latent states for TBPTT continuation
1264                final_pred_latent = latent_state
1265                final_true_latent = encoded_next_true[:, -1, ...].contiguous() if encoded_next_true is not None else None
1266
1267                return (
1268                    delta_pred_rollout,
1269                    delta_true_rollout,
1270                    x_next_pred_rollout,
1271                    reconstructed_true_rollout,
1272                    tend_pred_rollout,
1273                    tend_true_rollout,
1274                    final_pred_latent,
1275                    final_true_latent,
1276                )
1277
1278            return x_next_pred_rollout
1279
1280        # if not in globa mode, use single column training flow.
1281        # x_current_global and x_next_global will be given as (B, 3, 3, M)
1282
1283        else:
1284            # main model computation - use _encode_global to properly handle sin/cos
1285            encoded_state = self._encode_global(x_current_global)  # (B, 3, 3, 256)
1286            current_substeps = input_substeps if input_substeps is not None else self.input_substeps
1287            
1288            accumulated_delta_pred = 0
1289            # Sub-stepping loop for single column
1290            for sub_step in range(current_substeps):
1291                B, H, W, C = encoded_state.shape
1292                E_current_flat_patch = encoded_state.view(B, H * W, C)
1293                delta_pred_sub = self.mixer(E_current_flat_patch)  # (B, 256) (actually B*9, but output is 256?) - wait, mixer output depends on input
1294                # Mixer inputs/outputs are flattened patches or heads?
1295                # In single col mode, input is (B, 3, 3, M). _extract_patches inside _compute_latent_delta handles padding
1296                # But here we are calling self.mixer directly?
1297                # Wait, the original code called `self.mixer(E_current_flat_patch)`.
1298                # `encoded_state` is (B, 3, 3, 256). `E_current_flat_patch` is (B, 9, 256).
1299                # `self.mixer` is a Sequential of MixerBlocks.
1300                # StandardMixerBlock forward expects (Batch, NumPatches, Dim).
1301                # If we pass (B, 9, 256), it treats B as batch and 9 as num_patches.
1302                # That seems correct for single column 3x3 patch.
1303                
1304                # Apply delta
1305                center_state = encoded_state[:, 1, 1]  # (B, 256) 
1306                # !!! Wait, mixer outputs centered column?
1307                # No, StandardMixerBlock outputs (B, NumPatches, Dim).
1308                # FinalMixerBlock outputs (B, Dim) (with re-appended sin/cos).
1309                # If the last block is FinalMixerBlock, it returns (B, 256).
1310                
1311                # So delta_pred_sub is (B, 256).
1312                
1313                delta_learanble = delta_pred_sub[:, :-2]
1314                
1315                # Update center state
1316                center_learnable_next = center_state[:, :-2] + delta_learanble
1317                center_sin_cos = center_state[:, -2:]
1318                center_next = torch.cat([center_learnable_next, center_sin_cos], dim=-1) # (B, 256)
1319                
1320                # Now we need to update the FULL 3x3 patch for the next step?
1321                # In single column mode, we usually assume neighbors are constant or we don't have them?
1322                # The original code only updated `center_state`.
1323                # `encoded_state` was just `self._encode_global(x_current_global)`.
1324                # If we loop, we need a refined 3x3 patch.
1325                # But we only have usage for 1 column. 
1326                # If we assume neighbors don't change (Dirichlet/Fixed BCs for neighbors in this test mode), 
1327                # we can construct the next patch.
1328                
1329                # For consistency with the global loop, let's update the center in the patch.
1330                # But `encoded_state` is (B, 3, 3, 256). 
1331                # We can update encoded_state[:, 1, 1] = center_next.
1332                encoded_state[:, 1, 1] = center_next
1333                
1334                if isinstance(accumulated_delta_pred, int):
1335                    accumulated_delta_pred = delta_pred_sub
1336                else:
1337                    accumulated_delta_pred = accumulated_delta_pred + delta_pred_sub
1338            
1339            delta_pred = accumulated_delta_pred
1340            
1341            # Final E_next is the last center_next
1342            E_next = encoded_state[:, 1, 1] 
1343            decoded_pred = self.decoder(E_next)
1344
1345            # calculate auxilary outputs for loss computation
1346            encoded_next_true = self._encode_global(x_next_global)  # (B, 3, 3, 256)
1347            encoded_next_true_center = encoded_next_true[:, 1, 1]  # (B, 256)
1348            delta_true = encoded_next_true_center - center_state  # True delta (sin/cos part should be ~0)
1349            reconstructed_true = self.decoder(encoded_next_true_center)
1350            tend_pred = self.tend_decoder(delta_pred)
1351            tend_true = self.tend_decoder(delta_true)
1352
1353            return delta_pred, delta_true, decoded_pred, reconstructed_true, tend_pred, tend_true

A global atmospheric model that learns tendencies in a latent space.

It encodes a global grid into a latent representation, then applies a sequence of mixer blocks to predict the latent tendency for every grid cell. The final latent state is decoded back to the physical state.

NNorm_LatentGlobalAtmosMixer2( M_features: int, model_dim: int, n_heads: int, num_mixer_blocks: int, head_mlp_hidden_dims: List[int], ffn_hidden_dims: List[int], encoder_hidden_dims: List[int], dropout_rate: float = 0.1, grad_ckpt_level: int = 1, num_correction_blocks: int = 0, correction_head_mlp_hidden_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None, correction_ffn_hidden_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None, use_spectral_filter: bool = False, n_lat: int = 192, n_lon: int = 288, use_sfno: bool = False, sfno_embed_dim: int = 16, sfno_num_layers: int = 1, sfno_use_mlp: bool = False, sfno_scale_factor: int = 2, sfno_mlp_ratio: int = 4, patch_size: int = 3, use_mixer_encoder: bool = False, encoder_mixer_n_heads: Optional[int] = None, encoder_mixer_head_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None, encoder_mixer_ffn_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None, num_encoder_mixer_blocks: int = 1, input_substeps: int = 1, **kwargs) 
542    def __init__(self, M_features: int, model_dim: int, n_heads: int,
543                 num_mixer_blocks: int, head_mlp_hidden_dims: List[int],
544                 ffn_hidden_dims: List[int], encoder_hidden_dims: List[int],
545                 dropout_rate: float = 0.1, grad_ckpt_level: int = 1,
546                 num_correction_blocks: int = 0,
547                 correction_head_mlp_hidden_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None,
548                 correction_ffn_hidden_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None,
549                 use_spectral_filter: bool = False,
550                 n_lat: int = 192,
551                 n_lon: int = 288,
552                 use_sfno: bool = False,
553                 sfno_embed_dim: int = 16,
554                 sfno_num_layers: int = 1,
555                 sfno_use_mlp: bool = False,
556                 sfno_scale_factor: int = 2,
557                 sfno_mlp_ratio: int = 4,
558                 patch_size: int = 3,
559                 use_mixer_encoder: bool = False,
560                 encoder_mixer_n_heads: Optional[int] = None,
561                 encoder_mixer_head_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None,
562                 encoder_mixer_ffn_dims: Optional[List[int]] = None,
563                 num_encoder_mixer_blocks: int = 1,
564                 input_substeps: int = 1,
565                 **kwargs):
566        super().__init__()
567        self.M_features = M_features
568        self.model_dim = model_dim
569        self.patch_size = patch_size
570        self.pad_size = patch_size // 2
571        self.default_num_rollout_steps = 1
572        self.default_decode_freq = 1
573        self.is_training_mode = True
574        self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad = kwargs.pop('teacher_forcing_requires_grad', True)
575        self.grad_ckpt_level = grad_ckpt_level
576        if kwargs:
577            unexpected = ", ".join(kwargs.keys())
578            raise TypeError(f"Unexpected keyword arguments: {unexpected}")
579
580        if self.grad_ckpt_level not in (0, 1, 2, 3):
581            raise ValueError("grad_ckpt_level must be one of {0, 1, 2, 3}.")
582
583        if num_mixer_blocks < 1:
584            raise ValueError("num_mixer_blocks must be at least 1.")
585
586        self.input_substeps = input_substeps
587
588        # --- 1. Encoder and Decoder ---
589        self.use_mixer_encoder = use_mixer_encoder
590        if use_mixer_encoder:
591            # Inlined MixerEncoder: input projection + mixer blocks
592            # Use main config dims as defaults if not specified
593            enc_n_heads = encoder_mixer_n_heads if encoder_mixer_n_heads is not None else n_heads
594            enc_head_dims = encoder_mixer_head_dims if encoder_mixer_head_dims is not None else head_mlp_hidden_dims
595            enc_ffn_dims = encoder_mixer_ffn_dims if encoder_mixer_ffn_dims is not None else ffn_hidden_dims
596            
597            # Project M_features -> learnable_dim (model_dim - 2) before spatial mixing
598            # Sin/cos lat will be appended from the input in _encode_global
599            self.encoder_input_proj = nn.Linear(M_features, model_dim - 2)
600            
601            # Build encoder mixer blocks (same pattern as main mixer)
602            encoder_blocks_list = []
603            for block_idx in range(num_encoder_mixer_blocks - 1):
604                encoder_blocks_list.append(
605                    StandardMixerBlock(
606                        model_dim, patch_size, enc_n_heads, enc_head_dims, enc_ffn_dims,
607                        dropout_rate, use_residual=(block_idx != 0)
608                    )
609                )
610            encoder_blocks_list.append(
611                FinalMixerBlock(model_dim, patch_size, enc_n_heads, enc_head_dims, enc_ffn_dims, dropout_rate)
612            )
613            self.encoder_mixer_blocks = nn.ModuleList(encoder_blocks_list)
614            self.encoder = None  # Not used when mixer encoder is enabled
615        else:
616            self.encoder_input_proj = None
617            self.encoder_mixer_blocks = None
618            self.encoder = Encoder(M_features, model_dim, encoder_hidden_dims)
619        self.decoder = Decoder(model_dim, M_features, encoder_hidden_dims[::-1]) # Symmetrical decoder
620        self.tend_decoder = Decoder(model_dim, M_features, encoder_hidden_dims[::-1]) # Symmetrical decoder
621
622
623        # --- 2. Mixer Blocks ---
624        mixer_blocks_list = []
625        # Add N-1 Standard Mixer Blocks
626        for block_idx in range(num_mixer_blocks - 1):
627            mixer_blocks_list.append(
628                StandardMixerBlock(
629                    model_dim,
630                    self.patch_size,
631                    n_heads,
632                    head_mlp_hidden_dims,
633                    ffn_hidden_dims,
634                    dropout_rate,
635                    use_residual=(block_idx != 0)
636                )
637            )
638        # Add the Final Mixer Block to collapse the spatial info
639        mixer_blocks_list.append(
640            FinalMixerBlock(model_dim, self.patch_size, n_heads, head_mlp_hidden_dims, ffn_hidden_dims, dropout_rate)
641        )
642        self.mixer = nn.Sequential(*mixer_blocks_list)
643
644        # --- 3. Correction Layers ---
645        self.num_correction_blocks = num_correction_blocks
646        if self.num_correction_blocks > 0:
647            # Use provided dims or default to main mixer dims
648            c_head_dims = correction_head_mlp_hidden_dims if correction_head_mlp_hidden_dims is not None else head_mlp_hidden_dims
649            c_ffn_dims = correction_ffn_hidden_dims if correction_ffn_hidden_dims is not None else ffn_hidden_dims
650            
651            correction_blocks_list = []
652            # Add N-1 Standard Mixer Blocks
653            for block_idx in range(num_correction_blocks - 1):
654                correction_blocks_list.append(
655                    StandardMixerBlock(
656                        model_dim,
657                        self.patch_size,
658                        n_heads,
659                        c_head_dims,
660                        c_ffn_dims,
661                        dropout_rate,
662                        use_residual=True # Always use residual for correction layers? Or follow same pattern? 
663                                          # Let's assume yes, as they are refining an existing signal.
664                    )
665                )
666            # Add Final Mixer Block
667            correction_blocks_list.append(
668                FinalMixerBlock(model_dim, self.patch_size, n_heads, c_head_dims, c_ffn_dims, dropout_rate)
669            )
670            self.correction_layers = nn.Sequential(*correction_blocks_list)
671        else:
672            self.correction_layers = None
673
674        # --- 4. Spectral Filter (Optional) ---
675        self.use_spectral_filter = use_spectral_filter
676        if self.use_spectral_filter:
677            self.spectral_filter = SpectralFilter(n_lat=n_lat, n_lon=n_lon)
678        else:
679            self.spectral_filter = None
680
681        # --- 5. SFNO Post-Processor (Optional) ---
682        self.use_sfno = use_sfno
683        if self.use_sfno:
684            if not SFNO_AVAILABLE:
685                raise ImportError(
686                    "torch_harmonics is required for SFNO. Install with: pip install torch_harmonics"
687                )
688            self.sfno = SphericalFourierNeuralOperator(
689                img_size=(n_lat, n_lon),
690                in_chans=model_dim,
691                out_chans=model_dim,
692                embed_dim=sfno_embed_dim,
693                num_layers=sfno_num_layers,
694                use_mlp=sfno_use_mlp,
695                mlp_ratio=sfno_mlp_ratio,
696                residual_prediction=True,  # SFNO handles skip connection internally
697                scale_factor=sfno_scale_factor,
698                grid="equiangular",
699                normalization_layer="none",
700                pos_embed="learnable lat"
701            )
702        else:
703            self.sfno = None
704
705        self._set_mixer_grad_ckpt_level(self.grad_ckpt_level)
706        # Initialize encoder/decoder checkpoint levels
707        if self.use_mixer_encoder and self.encoder_mixer_blocks is not None:
708            block_level = 1 if self.grad_ckpt_level in (1, 3) else 0
709            for block in self.encoder_mixer_blocks:
710                if hasattr(block, "set_grad_ckpt_level"):
711                    block.set_grad_ckpt_level(block_level)
712        elif self.encoder is not None:
713            self.encoder.set_grad_ckpt_level(self.grad_ckpt_level)
714        self.decoder.set_grad_ckpt_level(self.grad_ckpt_level)
715        self.tend_decoder.set_grad_ckpt_level(self.grad_ckpt_level)

Initialize internal Module state, shared by both nn.Module and ScriptModule.

M_features
model_dim
patch_size
pad_size
default_num_rollout_steps
default_decode_freq
is_training_mode
teacher_forcing_requires_grad
grad_ckpt_level
input_substeps
use_mixer_encoder
decoder
tend_decoder
mixer
num_correction_blocks
use_spectral_filter
use_sfno
def set_teacher_forcing_grad(self, enabled: bool) -> None: 
717    def set_teacher_forcing_grad(self, enabled: bool) -> None:
718        self.teacher_forcing_requires_grad = bool(enabled)
def set_grad_ckpt_level(self, level: int) -> None: 
720    def set_grad_ckpt_level(self, level: int) -> None:
721        if level not in (0, 1, 2, 3):
722            raise ValueError("grad_ckpt_level must be one of {0, 1, 2, 3}.")
723        self.grad_ckpt_level = level
724        self._set_mixer_grad_ckpt_level(level)
725        # Propagate to encoder/decoder for level 3
726        if self.use_mixer_encoder and self.encoder_mixer_blocks is not None:
727            # Set grad ckpt level for encoder mixer blocks
728            block_level = 1 if level in (1, 3) else 0
729            for block in self.encoder_mixer_blocks:
730                if hasattr(block, "set_grad_ckpt_level"):
731                    block.set_grad_ckpt_level(block_level)
732        elif self.encoder is not None:
733            self.encoder.set_grad_ckpt_level(level)
734        self.decoder.set_grad_ckpt_level(level)
735        self.tend_decoder.set_grad_ckpt_level(level)
def forward( self, x_current_global: torch.Tensor, x_next_global: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None, *, num_rollout_steps: Optional[int] = None, decode_freq: Optional[int] = None, train: Optional[bool] = None, global_mode: Optional[bool] = True, TBPTT_latent_state: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None, TBPTT_prev_true_latent: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None, input_substeps: Optional[int] = None): 
748    def forward(
749        self,
750        x_current_global: torch.Tensor,
751        x_next_global: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
752        *,
753        num_rollout_steps: Optional[int] = None,
754        decode_freq: Optional[int] = None,
755        train: Optional[bool] = None,
756        global_mode: Optional[bool] = True,
757        TBPTT_latent_state: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
758        TBPTT_prev_true_latent: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
759        input_substeps: Optional[int] = None,
760    ):
761        use_full_ckpt = (
762            self.grad_ckpt_level >= 2
763            and global_mode
764            and self.training
765        )
766
767        if use_full_ckpt:
768            return self._forward_with_checkpoint(
769                x_current_global,
770                x_next_global,
771                num_rollout_steps=num_rollout_steps,
772                decode_freq=decode_freq,
773                train=train,
774                global_mode=global_mode,
775                TBPTT_latent_state=TBPTT_latent_state,
776                TBPTT_prev_true_latent=TBPTT_prev_true_latent,
777                input_substeps=input_substeps,
778            )
779
780        return self._forward_impl(
781            x_current_global,
782            x_next_global,
783            num_rollout_steps=num_rollout_steps,
784            decode_freq=decode_freq,
785            train=train,
786            global_mode=global_mode,
787            TBPTT_latent_state=TBPTT_latent_state,
788            TBPTT_prev_true_latent=TBPTT_prev_true_latent,
789            input_substeps=input_substeps,
790        )

Define the computation performed at every call.

Should be overridden by all subclasses.

Although the recipe for forward pass needs to be defined within this function, one should call the Module instance afterwards instead of this since the former takes care of running the registered hooks while the latter silently ignores them.
